parents.subject: LU-9639 ldlm: Add kernel doc style for LDLM (1)

commit.subject: LU-19952 utils: make lfs/lctl --list-commands work correctly
commit.message:
LU-19952 utils: make lfs/lctl --list-commands work correctly

Null-terminate top_level in cfs_parser() properly, otherwise it will
output the full command list wrongly in cfs_parser_list().
Also, sanity.sh test_911 is added to verify this patch.

Fixes: 0d77e94b47 ("LU-16723 parser: fix help hanging")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I25ddaefd67f6ed9f3e7d072544b0bf2372b0ea97
